monthly_summary_issue.title: [Repo Assist] Monthly Activity 2026-03
monthly_summary_issue.note: PR number unknown at write time - branch push happens after workflow

javascript-typescript-support.details: Implements JS/TS cognitive complexity via tree-sitter-javascript@0.21.4 and tree-sitter-typescript@0.21.2. 14 unit tests, all passing. Else/else-if double-counting fix via skipSelfIncrement flag.

notes: Issue #32 (JS/TS support) now has draft PR in review. PR #161 (release-please v0.2.1) still open for maintainer to merge. Feb monthly issue #155 closed; March one created. Next run: check if JS/TS PR has CI issues, check PR #161 status, reset backlog cursor to scan issues again.
